title: Section 82
content: 1[82. Definition of "patented articles" and "patentee".--In this Chapter, unless the context otherwise requires,-- (a) "patented article" includes any article made by a patented process; and (b) "patentee" includes an exclusive licensee.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 39, ibid., for Chapter XVI (sections 82 to 98) (w.e.f. 20-5-2003).
